About Saya, her 0 cost corrosion makes her a busted almost OP unit, I'm fine with that, especially when it's about endgame.

About Propagation Caro, exalt units generating strength/damage/aliemus/poison ... are supposed to benefit from the realm mechanic, but as stated earlier in the post
P caro embryo gen isn't helping exalting as often than in normal Caro.
Plus the lack of shield nor survivability make P caro very fragile.

Nymph might benefits.

Nothing really changes about other realms which is why I made this thread.
Unlike the other 2, Pcaro is a direct nerf to many caro units by having 200 embryo bar (which means they are less effective at generating embryos) and no first devour which goes against the idea of lower hp stronger things in caro. It heavily restricts teambuilding and characters just lose their value.

<@1437487264023318668> do you think you can pin this message? It's basically the tl;dr of this thread's discussions
Thanks

Casual bump

Also adding from a design space PCaro severely limits design space for future units.

With the focus primarily on exalt dmg / Shielding, any new units produced by Caro will ultimately be made with this concept in mind. However I personally think this is problematic as Caro already has exalt dmg dealers who are already not BIS with PCaro. Designing units that require either busted numbers or mechanics to ignore the hindrance of the realm isn’t great. 

The other divine Realms are less strict which allows the user to be more flexible in team building.
Aequor pretty strict though
